playbook.scope: For each P0/P1 in the past week, a written retro is published with timeline, contributing factors, action items with owners, and learnings filed into the runbook system.

success-criteria.criterion: For each P0/P1 in the past week, a written retro is published with timeline, contributing factors, action items with owners, and learnings filed into the runbook system
Decision gates passed at every stage with written rationale
Outputs of each stage filed in the canonical location for the team

stage.name: Prepare
stage.intent: Achieve the 'prepare' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Execute the prepare work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during prepare

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the prepare outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Inventory
stage.intent: Achieve the 'inventory' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Execute the inventory work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during inventory

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the inventory outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Decide approach
stage.intent: Achieve the 'decide approach' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Define entry conditions for decide approach
Execute the decide approach work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during decide approach

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the decide approach outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Execute
stage.intent: Achieve the 'execute' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Execute the execute work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during execute

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the execute outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Verify
stage.intent: Achieve the 'verify' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Execute the verify work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during verify

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the verify outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

stage.name: Document & decide
stage.intent: Achieve the 'document & decide' outcome for this playbook.

tasks.task: Define entry conditions for document & decide
Execute the document & decide work products listed in this playbook
Capture artifacts and decisions made during document & decide

stage.decision-gate: Advance once the document & decide outcome is reached AND blockers for the next stage are cleared.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content post-incident-retro-facilitation --format md, agent: faion get-content post-incident-retro-facilitation --format context, json: faion get-content post-incident-retro-facilitation --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for chunk-07 role-devops-engineer playbook}]
